title: Senior Vice President & Director of Business Development & Strategy
notes: SVP & Director of Business Development & Strategy at CMT. PE credential. Member of CMT Board of Directors. Leads firm-wide strategic growth and business development. Senior stakeholder for any enterprise partnership engaging the BD or pursuits function. Not yet engaged directly.
